candidate_llm_application: LLM reward-model gaming as cuckoo brood parasitism: policy evolves outputs that mimic reward-model-preferred features (the egg); reward model evolves discrimination; arms-race escalation in feature-level mimicry.

results.title: Reward Hacking Adversarial Dynamics: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on reward hacking adversarial dynamics, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
